LAW AND MOTION 302, NOTICE OF HEARING OF MOTION FOR ORDER FOR ALTERNATIVE WRIT OF MANDATE ARGUED - GRANTED. PETITIONER'S MEMBERSHIP IS REINSTATED WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR RESPONDENT TO MOVE FOR PETITIONER'S EXPULSION IN COMPLIANCE WITH STATE LAW. IN ADDITION, THE COURT STAYS THE REINSTATEMENT FOR 35 DAYS. Notice Of Hearing Of Motion For Order For Alternative Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Apr-05-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER THEODORE SAILOR'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE TO COMPEL REINSTATEMENT OF MEMBER OF MUTUAL BENEFIT CORPORATION.

APPEARANCES: Theodore Sailor, 218-8642 petitioner & moving party in propria persona; Lisa Crowfoot, Esq. of Gordon & Rees LLP 986-5900 for respondent & opposing party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED. PETITIONER'S MEMBERSHIP IS REINSTATED WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR RESPONDENT TO MOVE FOR PETITIONER'S EXPULSION IN COMPLIANCE WITH STATE LAW. In addition, the Court stays the reinstatement for 35 days. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Notice Of Hearing Of Motion For Order For Alternative Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Mar-10-2011 Continued To Apr-05-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER THEODORE SAILOR'S MOTION FOR ORDER FOR ALTERNATIVE WRIT OF MANDATE. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: continued to April 5, 2011. Moving party to provide courtesy copies of its moving papers to department 302 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. See San Francisco Local Rule 2.6 B. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
